lore.english:
The leader of all Taimanins, a group of ninjas who fight for justice. Serves as the headmistress of Gosha Academy, the educational institute for Taimanins.

Utilizes master swordsmanship and super-human physical capabilities, in addition to her ninja art that allows her to move at a speed beyond human perception. She has awakened her true power during a certain mission. Her weapon of choice is a ninja katana.

User of Hawk Art, a supernatural ninja art. Heightens her senses and physical capabilities for one second, allowing her to move as if six seconds have passed. She perceives the world in slow motion while using her ninja art; others perceive her as moving at the speed of light. Since her ninja art greatly exhausts her, she cannot use it multiple times at once.

Though she normally maintains her dignity as the Chief Commander of the Taimanins and the headmistress of the academy, she set aside those titles at the earnest request of a beloved junior—who, eyes sparkling, pleaded, "I want to see Miss Asagi at her most beautiful." This is her clad in the wedding dress prepared by that junior.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&EVD] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase EVD of Power allies by 7.5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase EVD of Power allies by 7.5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Bouquet Toss[-]
skills.description:
Throws a bouquet at the enemy to deal damage.
Reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2530102]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2530102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Throws a bouquet at the enemy to deal damage.
Reduces the target's Turn Gauge by (15%) at a 15% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Petal's Miracle[-]
skills.description:
Throws a bouquet into the air to grant [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2530202]%)[-] [&HealTurn] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] except self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2530202] turn(s)
Then grants [&CountAttack] to 1 ally with the highest ATK.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2530201] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Throws a bouquet into the air to grant (5.5%) Healing Over Time to ALL allies except self.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
Then grants Counterattack to 1 ally with the highest ATK.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]May Bride[-]
skills.description:
Asagi offers the bouquet with a radiant smile to grant [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2530301]%)[-] [&CriRateUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2530301] turn(s)
[&Resurrection]s fallen allies at [&Color_Cyan][V3:2530302]%[-] of their Max. [&HP].
skills.description_readable:
Asagi offers the bouquet with a radiant smile to grant (35%) CRIT Rate UP to ALL allies.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Revives fallen allies at 30% of their Max. HP.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Almighty Bride[-]
skills.description:
If [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25303] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], gains additional effects.
When using [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25301], reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] an additional [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2530401]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2530401]%[-] chance.
When using [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25302], additionally grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2530402]%)[-] [&AtkUp] to an ally with the highest ATK.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2530402] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
If May Bride is on Cooldown, gains additional effects.
When using Bouquet Toss, reduces the target's Turn Gauge an additional (15%) at a 15% chance.
When using Petal's Miracle, additionally grants (60%) ATK UP to an ally with the highest ATK.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_25301]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25302]
skill_data.description:
Throws a bouquet into the air to grant [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2531202]%)[-] [&DefUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] except self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2531202] turn(s)
Then grants [&CountAttack] to 1 ally with the highest ATK.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2531201] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Throws a bouquet into the air to grant (40%) DEF UP to ALL allies except self.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Then grants Counterattack to 1 ally with the highest ATK.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_25302]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25303]
skill_data.description:
Asagi offers the bouquet with a radiant smile to inflict [&Confuse] to 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2531301]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2531301] turn(s)
[&Resurrection]s fallen allies at [&Color_Cyan][V3:2531302]%[-] of their Max. [&HP].
skill_data.description_readable:
Asagi offers the bouquet with a radiant smile to inflict Confusion to 1 Random target at a 70% chance.
Duration: 1 turn(s)
Revives fallen allies at 30% of their Max. HP.
